roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard owner integration, central Plisio invoices and callbacks, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio invoices and callbacks, and latency-sensitive request handling
roles.processor: reports, retry queue, backups and background jobs

features: add a prominent PasarGuard API Key manager to the central web control panel
add PasarGuard API Key registration, panel URL change, connection test and deletion to the central Telegram bot
validate pg_key_ credentials against /api/admin before saving
hide the API key after storage and delete the Telegram message containing it
record last successful API verification and the last connection error
preserve legacy username/password and bearer access-token fallback modes
keep Plisio, BluePal, reseller bots and the fully split three-worker architecture unchanged

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.embedded_panel_scripts: passed for central control and advanced management HTML scripts
validation.central_bot_api_manager: passed by static route, callback and session assertions
validation.central_web_api_manager: passed by static DOM, form-handler and backend-action assertions
validation.api_key_validation: pg_key_ format checked and /api/admin is called before saving
validation.secret_exposure: API key stays masked in bootstrap, is not returned by save actions, and Telegram source messages are deleted
validation.legacy_auth_fallback: username/password and legacy bearer token modes remain available after API-key deletion
validation.live_pasarguard_call: not run; no live panel API key was supplied
